name: create_budget_spreadsheet_excel
goal_template: Create a monthly budget spreadsheet for {month_year} with income and expense sections, a net-savings summary, and a bar chart

steps.intent: Open a new blank Excel workbook
steps.target_desc: New Blank Workbook button on the start screen

steps.intent: Enter the spreadsheet title in cell A1
Build the INCOME section header and row labels (A3:A7)
Enter a SUM formula for total income in B7
Build the EXPENSES section header and row labels (A9:A17)
Enter a SUM formula for total expenses in B17
Enter the NET SAVINGS formula =B7-B17 in B19
Format the B column range as Currency with 2 decimal places
Insert a clustered bar chart comparing income and expenses
Apply conditional formatting to B19 (green/red on sign)
steps.target_desc: Conditional Formatting > New Rule on B19

steps.intent: Save the workbook as an .xlsx file

success_checks: Workbook saved as Budget_[MonthYear].xlsx without errors
B7 displays the correct sum of income rows
B17 displays the correct sum of expense rows
B19 reflects B7 minus B17 and is colour-coded by sign
Bar chart is visible on the sheet and labelled correctly
